verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Here I am, Oh God I bring this sacrifice My open heart I offer up my life I look to You, Lord Your love that never ends Restores me again

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So I lift my eyes to You Lord In Your strength, will I break through Lord. Touch me now. Let Your love fall down on me I know Your love dispels all my fears.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Through the storm I will hold on Lord And by faith I will walk on Lord Then I'll see beyond my calvary one day And I will be complete in You
